mapper.delete: delete from dwd_order_item where dt = date(#{dt})
mapper.insert: insert into dwd_order_item( order_id, shop_id, shop_name, product_id, product_name, sku_id, sku_name, quantity, channel_code, channel_name, pay_amount, product_cost, platform_fee, ad_cost, freight_fee, refund_cost, profit_amount, order_status, pay_time, dt ) select o.order_id, o.shop_id, o.shop_name, jt.product_id, jt.product_name, jt.sku_id, jt.sku_name, jt.quantity, coalesce(jt.channel_code, o.channel_code), coalesce(jt.channel_name, o.channel_name), jt.pay_amount, coalesce(jt.product_cost, 0), coalesce(o.platform_fee, 0), coalesce(o.ad_cost, 0), coalesce(o.freight_fee, 0), coalesce(o.refund_cost, 0), jt.pay_amount - coalesce(jt.product_cost, 0) - coalesce(o.platform_fee, 0) - coalesce(o.ad_cost, 0) - coalesce(o.freight_fee, 0) - coalesce(o.refund_cost, 0), o.order_status, o.pay_time, date(o.pay_time) from ods_order_raw o join json_table(o.sku_order_list, '$[*]' columns ( product_id bigint path '$.productId', product_name varchar(128) path '$.productName', sku_id bigint path '$.skuId', sku_name varchar(128) path '$.skuName', quantity int path '$.quantity', channel_code varchar(64) path '$.channelCode', channel_name varchar(128) path '$.channelName', pay_amount decimal(12,2) path '$.payAmount', product_cost decimal(12,2) path '$.productCost' )) jt where date(o.pay_time) = date(#{dt})

replace into dws_finance_day_profit( dt, shop_id, shop_name, gmv, net_amount, product_cost, platform_fee, ad_cost, freight_fee, after_sale_cost, profit_amount, order_count ) select dt, shop_id, max(shop_name), sum(pay_amount), sum(pay_amount - coalesce(refund_cost, 0)), sum(product_cost), sum(platform_fee), sum(ad_cost), sum(freight_fee), sum(refund_cost), sum(profit_amount), count(distinct order_id) from dwd_order_item where dt = date(#{dt}) group by dt, shop_id
mapper.delete: delete from fin_order_profit_attribution where profit_date = date(#{dt})
mapper.insert: insert into fin_order_profit_attribution( sales_no, order_id, order_item_id, shop_id, shop_name, product_id, product_name, sku_id, sku_name, channel_code, channel_name, operator_id, operator_name, attribution_rule_id, attribution_rule_code, share_rate, pay_amount, net_amount, product_cost, platform_fee, promotion_fee, freight_fee, after_sale_cost, profit_amount, share_profit_amount, profit_date, period_code, create_time ) select cast(d.order_id as char), d.order_id, d.order_item_id, d.shop_id, d.shop_name, d.product_id, d.product_name, d.sku_id, d.sku_name, coalesce(d.channel_code, ''), coalesce(d.channel_name, ''), r.operator_id, r.operator_name, r.rule_id, r.rule_code, coalesce(r.share_rate, 1), d.pay_amount, d.pay_amount - coalesce(d.refund_cost, 0), d.product_cost, d.platform_fee, d.ad_cost, d.freight_fee, d.refund_cost, d.profit_amount, round(d.profit_amount * coalesce(r.share_rate, 1), 2), d.dt, date_format(d.dt, '%Y-%m'), sysdate() from dwd_order_item d join erp_operator_attribution_rule r on r.rule_id = ( select rr.rule_id from erp_operator_attribution_rule rr where rr.status in ('0', 'enabled', 'approved') and (rr.effective_start is null or rr.effective_start <= d.dt) and (rr.effective_end is null or rr.effective_end >= d.dt) and (rr.shop_id is null or rr.shop_id = d.shop_id) and (rr.product_id is null or rr.product_id = d.product_id) and (rr.sku_id is null or rr.sku_id = d.sku_id) and (rr.channel_code is null or rr.channel_code = coalesce(d.channel_code, '')) order by (case when rr.sku_id is not null then 8 else 0 end + case when rr.product_id is not null then 4 else 0 end + case when rr.channel_code is not null then 2 else 0 end + case when rr.shop_id is not null then 1 else 0 end) desc, rr.priority asc, rr.rule_id desc limit 1 ) where d.dt = date(#{dt})

replace into fin_operator_profit_day( dt, period_code, shop_id, shop_name, operator_id, operator_name, channel_code, channel_name, order_count, gmv, net_amount, product_cost, platform_fee, ad_cost, freight_fee, after_sale_cost, profit_amount, share_profit_amount, settlement_amount, update_time ) select profit_date, max(period_code), shop_id, max(shop_name), operator_id, max(operator_name), coalesce(channel_code, ''), max(channel_name), count(distinct sales_no), sum(pay_amount), sum(net_amount), sum(product_cost), sum(platform_fee), sum(promotion_fee), sum(freight_fee), sum(after_sale_cost), sum(profit_amount), sum(share_profit_amount), sum(settlement_amount), sysdate() from fin_order_profit_attribution where profit_date = date(#{dt}) group by profit_date, shop_id, operator_id, coalesce(channel_code, '')
